sentences.arabic: كَانَ هُنَاكَ قَلْعَةٌ قَدِيمَةٌ عَلَى قِمَّةِ التَّلِّ.
sentences.translation: Na vrhu brežuljka nalazila se stara tvrđava.
sentences.translationEn: There was an old castle on top of the hill.

sentences.arabic: بَنَى النَّاسُ هَذِهِ الْقَلْعَةَ مِنَ الْحِجَارَةِ الْكَبِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi su izgradili ovu tvrđavu od velikog kamenja.
sentences.translationEn: The people built this castle from large stones.
The castle used to protect the city.

sentences.arabic: لَا تَزَالُ بَعْضُ أَجْزَاءِ الْقَلْعَةِ قَائِمَةً حَتَّى الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Neki dijelovi tvrđave stoje još i danas.
sentences.translationEn: Some parts of the castle still stand to this day.
